Label: /FR-U-20/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if no neural network is selected
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the user attempts to proceed without selecting a neural network.

Label: /FR-U-50/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if no hardware component is selected
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the user attempts to proceed without selecting a hardware component.

Label: /FR-U-60/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for image uploads
Correction: The system shall support image uploads in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats only.

Label: /FR-U-80/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if no input image is selected
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the user attempts to start the inference without selecting an input image.

Label: /FR-U-100/
Issue: Does not specify the format for displaying diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall display diagnostic data in a tabular format, including columns for inference result, confidence score, latency, and hardware information.

Label: /FR-U-110/
Issue: Does not specify the file format for exporting results
Correction: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in CSV format.

Label: /FR-U-120/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if the inference is aborted
Correction: The system shall display a confirmation message when the inference is aborted and return to the starting screen.

Label: /FR-U-130/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of input images for batch processing
Correction: The system shall allow a maximum of 10 input images for batch processing.

Label: /FR-U-150/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of hardware components for batch processing
Correction: The system shall allow a maximum of 5 hardware components for batch processing.

Label: /FR-U-170/
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of inference runs
Correction: The system shall allow a maximum of 100 inference runs with the same arguments.

Label: /FR-A-30/
Issue: Does not specify the criteria for argument validity
Correction: The system shall check that all selected arguments (neural network, hardware component, input image) are compatible and valid before enabling the "Start the inference" button.

Label: /FR-A-70/
Issue: Does not specify the format for the runtime log file
Correction: The system shall save the runtime log file in plain text format.

Label: /PD10/
Issue: Does not specify the minimum dimensions for input images
Correction: The system shall only accept input images with dimensions of at least 224x224 pixels.

Label: /PD20/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if the imported neural network is incompatible
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the imported neural network topology is not compatible with the specified hardware.

Label: /PD30/
Issue: Does not specify the format for inference results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall save inference results and diagnostic data in CSV format.
